local function ShowLoadingScreen()
    local Players = game:GetService("Players")
    local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")
    local LocalPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer
    local PlayerGui = LocalPlayer:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")

    local ScreenGui = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
    ScreenGui.Name = "NasaLoadingScreen"
    ScreenGui.IgnoreGuiInset = true
    ScreenGui.Parent = PlayerGui

    local MainFrame = Instance.new("Frame")
    MainFrame.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
    MainFrame.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(2, 2, 5)
    MainFrame.Parent = ScreenGui

    local Title = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    Title.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 100)
    Title.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.3, 0)
    Title.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    Title.Text = "SYSTEM INITIALIZING"
    Title.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 200, 255)
    Title.Font = Enum.Font.Code
    Title.TextSize = 40
    Title.Parent = MainFrame

    local ProgressBarFrame = Instance.new("Frame")
    ProgressBarFrame.Size = UDim2.new(0.4, 0, 0, 4)
    ProgressBarFrame.Position = UDim2.new(0.3, 0, 0.5, 0)
    ProgressBarFrame.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(20, 20, 40)
    ProgressBarFrame.BorderSizePixel = 0
    ProgressBarFrame.Parent = MainFrame

    local ProgressBar = Instance.new("Frame")
    ProgressBar.Size = UDim2.new(0, 0, 1, 0)
    ProgressBar.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 255)
    ProgressBar.BorderSizePixel = 0
    ProgressBar.Parent = ProgressBarFrame

    local StatusLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    StatusLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 30)
    StatusLabel.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.55, 0)
    StatusLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    StatusLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 150, 200)
    StatusLabel.Font = Enum.Font.Code
    StatusLabel.TextSize = 14
    StatusLabel.Parent = MainFrame

    local logs = {
        "CONNECTING TO NASA DEEP SPACE NETWORK...",
        "SYNCING QUANTUM RHYTHM ENGINE...",
        "LOADING ANIME ASSETS DATABASE...",
        "CALIBRATING ZERO-DRIFT TIMERS...",
        "DECRYPTING SONG SEQUENCES...",
        "NEURAL LINK ESTABLISHED.",
        "SYSTEM READY. WELCOME COMMANDER."
    }

    for i, log in ipairs(logs) do
        StatusLabel.Text = log
        local progress = i / #logs
        TweenService:Create(ProgressBar, TweenInfo.new(0.5), {Size = UDim2.new(progress, 0, 1, 0)}):Play()
        task.wait(0.6)
    end

    TweenService:Create(MainFrame, TweenInfo.new(1), {BackgroundTransparency = 1}):Play()
    TweenService:Create(Title, TweenInfo.new(0.5), {TextTransparency = 1}):Play()
    TweenService:Create(ProgressBarFrame, TweenInfo.new(0.5), {BackgroundTransparency = 1}):Play()
    TweenService:Create(ProgressBar, TweenInfo.new(0.5), {BackgroundTransparency = 1}):Play()
    TweenService:Create(StatusLabel, TweenInfo.new(0.5), {TextTransparency = 1}):Play()
    
    task.wait(1)
    ScreenGui:Destroy()
end

local function CreateFuturisticHub()
    local Players = game:GetService("Players")
    local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")
    local LocalPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer
    local PlayerGui = LocalPlayer:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")

    local ScreenGui = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
    ScreenGui.Name = "NasaHubUI"
    ScreenGui.IgnoreGuiInset = true
    ScreenGui.Parent = PlayerGui

    local Main = Instance.new("Frame")
    Main.Size = UDim2.new(0.6, 0, 0.6, 0)
    Main.Position = UDim2.new(0.2, 0, 0.18, 0)
    Main.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(8, 8, 18)
    Main.BorderSizePixel = 0
    Main.Parent = ScreenGui

    local Glow = Instance.new("Frame")
    Glow.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
    Glow.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    Glow.BorderSizePixel = 0
    Glow.Parent = Main

    local Title = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    Title.Size = UDim2.new(1, -40, 0, 48)
    Title.Position = UDim2.new(0, 20, 0, 12)
    Title.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    Title.Text = "N A S A  •  FUTURISTIC HUB"
    Title.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 210, 255)
    Title.Font = Enum.Font.Code
    Title.TextSize = 28
    Title.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.8
    Title.Parent = Main

    local Sub = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    Sub.Size = UDim2.new(1, -40, 0, 22)
    Sub.Position = UDim2.new(0, 20, 0, 62)
    Sub.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    Sub.Text = "Welcome, Commander"
    Sub.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(120, 200, 255)
    Sub.Font = Enum.Font.Arial
    Sub.TextSize = 14
    Sub.Parent = Main

    local Buttons = {"Play", "Library", "Settings", "Exit"}
    for i, name in ipairs(Buttons) do
        local btn = Instance.new("TextButton")
        btn.Size = UDim2.new(0, 140, 0, 36)
        btn.Position = UDim2.new(0, 24 + (i-1) * 150, 0, 100)
        btn.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(12, 12, 30)
        btn.BorderSizePixel = 0
        btn.Text = name
        btn.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(170, 240, 255)
        btn.Font = Enum.Font.Code
        btn.TextSize = 16
        btn.Parent = Main

        btn.MouseEnter:Connect(function()
            TweenService:Create(btn, TweenInfo.new(0.18), {BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 40, 60)}):Play()
        end)
        btn.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
            TweenService:Create(btn, TweenInfo.new(0.18), {BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(12, 12, 30)}):Play()
        end)
    end

    -- subtle floating animation
    spawn(function()
        while ScreenGui.Parent do
            TweenService:Create(Main, TweenInfo.new(4, Enum.EasingStyle.Sine, Enum.EasingDirection.InOut), {Position = Main.Position + UDim2.new(0,0,0,6)}):Play()
            task.wait(4)
            TweenService:Create(Main, TweenInfo.new(4, Enum.EasingStyle.Sine, Enum.EasingDirection.InOut), {Position = Main.Position - UDim2.new(0,0,6,0)}):Play()
            task.wait(4)
        end
    end)
end

task.spawn(ShowLoadingScreen)
task.wait(4.5)
task.spawn(CreateFuturisticHub)

local Config = {
    DefaultBPM = 166,
    MinSpeed          = 0.25,
    MaxSpeed          = 3.00,
    NightcoreSpeed    = 1.35,   -- +35%
    SlowedSpeed       = 0.80,   -- -20%
    ChordDelay        = 0.014,  -- segura o acorde por ~14ms (notas juntas, não arpejadas)
    KeyHold = 0.07,   -- segura a nota ~0.07s (IGUAL ao TALENTLESS = som cheio, não cortado)
    AntiLagThrottle   = 0.004,  -- limite mínimo entre notas (anti-travamento)
    HumanizeJitter    = 0.004,  -- ± jitter no AGENDAMENTO (sem drift), p/ soar humano
    HumanizeEnabled   = false,  -- DESLIGADO = ritmo perfeito na grade (ligue p/ feel "humano")
    AntiLagEnabled    = true,
    SubdivPerBeat     = 4,      -- cada nota = 1/16 (igual às transcrições originais)
    DashStep          = 1.00,   -- "-" = 1 passo inteiro
    SpaceStep = 0.00,   -- " " NÃO gasta tempo (senão arrasta a música e fica LENTA)
    MouseClickEnabled = false,  -- EXPERIMENTAL: clica as teclas na tela com o mouse (liga nas config)
}

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
--  ARTE ANIME DO HUB  🎴
--  O script tenta carregar a imagem nesta ordem (e mostra um
--  placeholder bonito se nada carregar — nunca caixa vazia):
--   1) url        -> LINK direto de uma imagem .png/.jpg (MAIS FÁCIL no Delta)
--   2) localFile  -> arquivo .png na pasta do executor
--   3) asset      -> ID de decal/imagem do Roblox
--
--  ► JEITO MAIS FÁCIL (Delta / celular): cole um LINK de imagem em url.
--    Ex.:  url = "https://i.imgur.com/SEU_LINK.png"
--    Como pegar um link: ache uma imagem de anime no navegador, segure o
--    dedo nela → "Copiar endereço da imagem". Ou suba a SUA foto em
--    postimages.org / imgur e copie o link direto (que termina em .png/.jpg).
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
local ART = {
    url       = "",                       -- ◄ cole aqui um LINK de imagem (recomendado no Delta)
    localFile = nil,                      -- ex: "minha_anime.png" (arquivo na pasta do executor)
    asset     = "rbxassetid://11696860078",
    options = {
        "rbxassetid://11696860078", -- kawaii pink anime girl
        "rbxassetid://5252447904",  -- anime aesthetic
        "rbxassetid://6029337509",  -- cute aesthetic anime girl
        "rbxassetid://8660789922",  -- aesthetic anime girl
        "rbxassetid://5206932266",  -- kawaii
        "rbxassetid://6368110022",  -- aesthetic cute anime girl
    },
}

-- Textos com variáveis (precisam de format): por chave
local TR_FMT = {
    songs   = { pt="%d músicas",  en="%d songs",  es="%d canciones" },
    showing = { pt="  •  mostrando %d (refine a busca)", en="  •  showing %d (refine search)", es="  •  mostrando %d (refina la búsqueda)" },
    note    = { pt="%s  •  %d%%  •  nota %d/%d", en="%s  •  %d%%  •  note %d/%d", es="%s  •  %d%%  •  nota %d/%d" },
    ready   = { pt="Pronto. 🌸 by Kokuyt450-create", en="Ready. 🌸 by Kokuyt450-create", es="Listo. 🌸 by Kokuyt450-create" },
    loaded  = { pt="🌸 TALENTLESS Anime carregado — %d músicas prontas!", en="🌸 TALENTLESS Anime loaded — %d songs ready!", es="🌸 TALENTLESS Anime cargado — %d canciones listas!" },
    all     = { pt="✦ Todas",     en="✦ All",       es="✦ Todas" },
    favs    = { pt="★ Favoritos", en="★ Favorites", es="★ Favoritos" },
    custom  = { pt="⭐ Custom",   en="⭐ Custom",    es="⭐ Custom" },
}
local function langIdx() return (State.lang == "en" and 2) or (State.lang == "es" and 3) or 1 end
local function tr(key)
    local e = TR_FMT[key]
    if not e then return key end
    return e[State.lang] or e.pt
end
-- mapa pt -> linha (montado uma vez) p/ o tradutor de textos fixos
local _trmap
local function trMap()
    if not _trmap then
        _trmap = {}
        for _, row in ipairs(TR_STATIC) do _trmap[row[1]] = row end
    end
    return _trmap
end

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
--  PERSISTÊNCIA (custom songs + favoritos) — seguro p/ qualquer executor
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
local SAVE_FILE = "Talentless_Kokuyt450.json"

local function saveData()
    pcall(function()
        if not writefile then return end
        writefile(SAVE_FILE, HttpService:JSONEncode({
            customSongs = State.customSongs,
            favorites   = State.favorites,
            lang        = State.lang,
        }))
    end)
end

local function loadData()
    pcall(function()
        if isfile and readfile and isfile(SAVE_FILE) then
            local d = HttpService:JSONDecode(readfile(SAVE_FILE))
            if d then
                State.customSongs = d.customSongs or {}
                State.favorites   = d.favorites   or {}
                State.lang        = d.lang        or State.lang
            end
        end
    end)
    -- injeta custom songs salvas no banco
    for _, c in ipairs(State.customSongs) do
        table.insert(Songs, { name=c.name, bpm=c.bpm or 120, emoji="⭐", category="Custom", sequence=c.sequence, custom=true })
    end
    TOTAL_SONGS = #Songs
end

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
--  DETECÇÃO DE MÚSICAS QUEBRADAS  (só traços = sem som)
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
local function isPlayableSeq(seq)
    if not seq then return false end
    local n = 0
    for i = 1, #seq do
        local c = seq:sub(i, i)
        if c ~= "-" and c ~= " " and c ~= "[" and c ~= "]" then
            n = n + 1
            if n >= 3 then return true end
        end
    end
    return false
end

-- índices tocáveis + contagem por categoria (recalculável)
local PlayableIdx = {}
local CategoryCount = {}
local function rebuildIndexes()
    PlayableIdx = {}
    CategoryCount = {}
    for i = 1, #Songs do
        local s = Songs[i]
        if s and isPlayableSeq(s.sequence) then
            s.broken = false
            table.insert(PlayableIdx, i)
            local cat = s.category or "Outros"
            CategoryCount[cat] = (CategoryCount[cat] or 0) + 1
        elseif s then
            s.broken = true
        end
    end
end

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
--  PARSER DE SEQUÊNCIA
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
local function parseSequence(seq)
    local tokens, i, len = {}, 1, #seq
    while i <= len do
        local ch = seq:sub(i, i)
        if ch == "[" then
            local j = seq:find("]", i)
            if j then
                local keys = {}
                for k = i+1, j-1 do
                    local c = seq:sub(k, k)
                    if KeyMap[c] then keys[#keys+1] = { key=KeyMap[c], shift=ShiftKeys[c] or false, char=c } end
                end
                if #keys > 0 then tokens[#tokens+1] = { type="chord", keys=keys } end
                i = j + 1
            else i = i + 1 end
        elseif ch == "-" then tokens[#tokens+1] = { type="dash" };  i = i + 1
        elseif ch == " " then tokens[#tokens+1] = { type="space" }; i = i + 1
        elseif KeyMap[ch] then tokens[#tokens+1] = { type="note", key=KeyMap[ch], shift=ShiftKeys[ch] or false, char=ch }; i = i + 1
        else i = i + 1 end
    end
    return tokens
end

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
--  MOUSE (EXPERIMENTAL): descobre as teclas na tela e clica nelas
--  Funciona se o jogo nomeia/escreve cada tecla com 1 letra (ex.: "q").
--  Se não achar, cai no teclado normal (não quebra nada).
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
local LocalPlayer = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer
local MouseMap = nil   -- char -> botão na tela (cache)

local function isHubObj(o)
    local cur = o
    while cur and cur ~= game do
        local n = tostring(cur.Name):lower()
        if n:find("talentless") or n:find("sakura") or n:find("tlakey") or n:find("scaninfo") then return true end
        cur = cur.Parent
    end
    return false
end

local function buildMouseMap()
    MouseMap = {}
    local pg = LocalPlayer:FindFirstChild("PlayerGui")
    if not pg then return end
    for _, o in ipairs(pg:GetDescendants()) do
        if (o:IsA("TextButton") or o:IsA("ImageButton")) and not isHubObj(o) then
            local id
            local nm = tostring(o.Name)
            if #nm == 1 then id = nm
            else
                local t = ""; pcall(function() t = tostring(o.Text or "") end)
                if #t == 1 then id = t end
            end
            if id and not MouseMap[id] then MouseMap[id] = o end
        end
    end
end

-- clica no botão da tecla (move o mouse até ela e segura ~KeyHold). true se achou.
local function clickKeyChar(char)
    if not char then return false end
    if not MouseMap then buildMouseMap() end
    local btn = MouseMap and (MouseMap[char] or MouseMap[char:lower()] or MouseMap[char:upper()])
    if not btn or not btn.Parent then return false end
    local p, s = btn.AbsolutePosition, btn.AbsoluteSize
    local x, y = math.floor(p.X + s.X/2), math.floor(p.Y + s.Y/2)
    pcall(function() VIM:SendMouseButtonEvent(x, y, 0, true, game, 0) end)
    task.delay(Config.KeyHold, function()
        pcall(function() VIM:SendMouseButtonEvent(x, y, 0, false, game, 0) end)
    end)
    return true
end

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
--  ENVIO DE TECLAS (segura ~0.07s igual ao TALENTLESS = som "cheio")
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
local function pressKey(keyCode, shift, char)
    -- modo mouse: se ligado e achou a tecla na tela, clica nela (sem teclado p/ não duplicar)
    if Config.MouseClickEnabled and clickKeyChar(char) then return end
    pcall(function()
        if shift then VIM:SendKeyEvent(true, Enum.KeyCode.LeftShift, false, game) end
        VIM:SendKeyEvent(true, keyCode, false, game)
    end)
    -- solta depois de KeyHold s, SEM travar o motor (release agendado)
    task.delay(Config.KeyHold, function()
        pcall(function()
            VIM:SendKeyEvent(false, keyCode, false, game)
            if shift then VIM:SendKeyEvent(false, Enum.KeyCode.LeftShift, false, game) end
        end)
    end)
end

local function playChord(keys)
    -- modo mouse: clica as teclas que achar na tela; o resto vai pelo teclado
    local kb = {}
    for _, k in ipairs(keys) do
        if not (Config.MouseClickEnabled and clickKeyChar(k.char)) then
            kb[#kb+1] = k
        end
    end
    if #kb == 0 then return end
    pcall(function()
        for _, k in ipairs(kb) do
            if k.shift then VIM:SendKeyEvent(true, Enum.KeyCode.LeftShift, false, game) end
            VIM:SendKeyEvent(true, k.key, false, game)
        end
    end)
    -- segura o acorde por KeyHold s e solta tudo junto (não-bloqueante)
    task.delay(Config.KeyHold, function()
        pcall(function()
            for _, k in ipairs(kb) do
                VIM:SendKeyEvent(false, k.key, false, game)
                if k.shift then VIM:SendKeyEvent(false, Enum.KeyCode.LeftShift, false, game) end
            end
        end)
    end)
end

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
--  MOTOR DE RITMO — AGENDAMENTO ABSOLUTO (SEM DRIFT)
--  Aqui está o segredo do "ritmo perfeito": em vez de somar
--  task.wait() (que acumula atraso a cada nota), marcamos o tempo
--  alvo de cada nota a partir do relógio inicial. Assim a música
--  NUNCA desanda — fica idêntica ao BPM real do começo ao fim.
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
local function baseStep(song)
    local bpm   = song.bpm or Config.DefaultBPM
    local mult  = song.speed_mult or 1.0
    local step  = (60 / bpm) * (1 / Config.SubdivPerBeat) * mult   -- 1/16 por slot
    local sm    = State.speed
    if State.mode == "Nightcore" then sm = sm * Config.NightcoreSpeed
    elseif State.mode == "Slowed" then sm = sm * Config.SlowedSpeed end
    local d = step / sm
    if Config.AntiLagEnabled and d < Config.AntiLagThrottle then d = Config.AntiLagThrottle end
    return d
end

local function playSong(idx)
    local song = Songs[idx]
    if not song then return end
    local tokens = parseSequence(song.sequence)
    State.totalNotes  = #tokens
    State.currentNote = 0
    State.progress    = 0
    if #tokens == 0 then return end

    local startClock  = os.clock()
    local virtualTime = 0
    local catchUp     = 0   -- contador p/ recuperação de lag (re-sincroniza na grade)

    for ti, token in ipairs(tokens) do
        if not State.isPlaying then break end

        -- pausa: congela o relógio para não "correr atrás" ao retomar
        while State.isPaused do
            task.wait(0.03)
            if not State.isPlaying then return end
            startClock = os.clock() - virtualTime
        end

        local step = baseStep(song)

        -- avança o tempo virtual SEM jitter (a grade nunca desanda)
        local fired = false
        if token.type == "note" then
            pressKey(token.key, token.shift, token.char)
            virtualTime = virtualTime + step
            fired = true
        elseif token.type == "chord" then
            playChord(token.keys)
            virtualTime = virtualTime + step
            fired = true
        elseif token.type == "dash" then
            virtualTime = virtualTime + step * Config.DashStep   -- pausa/sustain = passo inteiro
        elseif token.type == "space" then
            virtualTime = virtualTime + step * Config.SpaceStep  -- só separador (0 por padrão)
        end

        -- "humanize" aplicado SÓ no disparo desta nota, sem acumular -> soa humano e fica sincronizado
        local jit = 0
        if fired and Config.HumanizeEnabled then
            jit = (math.random() * 2 - 1) * Config.HumanizeJitter
        end

        State.currentNote = ti
        State.progress    = ti / #tokens

        -- espera ATÉ o tempo alvo absoluto; se estiver atrasado, recupera na hora (volta pra grade)
        local target = startClock + virtualTime + jit
        local now    = os.clock()
        if now < target then
            catchUp = 0
            local remaining = target - now
            if remaining > 0.03 then task.wait(remaining - 0.012) end
            while os.clock() < target do
                if not State.isPlaying then break end
                RunService.Heartbeat:Wait()
            end
        else
            -- atrasado (lag): dispara a próxima nota IMEDIATAMENTE p/ re-sincronizar na grade,
            -- cedendo 1 frame só de vez em quando p/ não travar o jogo
            catchUp = catchUp + 1
            if catchUp >= 24 then
                catchUp = 0
                RunService.Heartbeat:Wait()
            end
        end
    end
end

local function stopPlayback()
    State.isPlaying = false
    State.isPaused  = false
    State.progress  = 0
    State.currentNote = 0
    if State.playThread then
        pcall(function() task.cancel(State.playThread) end)
        State.playThread = nil
    end
end

local function startPlayback()
    if State.isPlaying then return end
    State.isPlaying = true
    State.isPaused  = false
    State.playThread = task.spawn(function()
        repeat
            playSong(State.currentSong)
            if State.isPlaying then
                if not State.autoNext then
                    State.isPlaying = false
                elseif State.loopEnabled then
                    -- repete a mesma
                elseif #State.queue > 0 then
                    State.queuePos = (State.queuePos % #State.queue) + 1
                    State.currentSong = State.queue[State.queuePos]
                elseif State.shuffleEnabled then
                    State.currentSong = PlayableIdx[math.random(1, #PlayableIdx)]
                else
                    State.currentSong = (State.currentSong % #Songs) + 1
                end
            end
        until not State.isPlaying
        State.isPlaying = false
    end)
end

local function pauseResume()
    if not State.isPlaying then startPlayback()
    else State.isPaused = not State.isPaused end
end

local function nextSong()
    stopPlayback()
    if #State.queue > 0 then
        State.queuePos = (State.queuePos % #State.queue) + 1
        State.currentSong = State.queue[State.queuePos]
    elseif State.shuffleEnabled then
        State.currentSong = PlayableIdx[math.random(1, #PlayableIdx)]
    else
        State.currentSong = (State.currentSong % #Songs) + 1
    end
end

local function prevSong()
    stopPlayback()
    State.currentSong = ((State.currentSong - 2) % #Songs) + 1
end

local function playIndex(idx, autoNext)
    if not Songs[idx] then return end
    stopPlayback()
    State.currentSong = idx
    State.autoNext = autoNext and true or false
    startPlayback()
end

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
--  INICIALIZAÇÃO DE DADOS
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
loadData()
rebuildIndexes()
-- começa numa música tocável
if Songs[State.currentSong] and Songs[State.currentSong].broken then
    State.currentSong = PlayableIdx[1] or 1
end

    cyan      = Color3.fromRGB(150, 210, 255), -- azul claro
    purple    = Color3.fromRGB(165, 95, 255),  -- roxo vibrante
    purpleGlow= Color3.fromRGB(178, 145, 255), -- glow roxo

    red       = Color3.fromRGB(255, 122, 160), -- vermelho suave

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
--  HELPERS DE CRIAÇÃO DE UI
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
local UI = {}   -- guarda só os elementos que precisam de update depois

local function mk(class, props, parent)
    local o = Instance.new(class)
    if props then
        for k, v in pairs(props) do o[k] = v end
    end
    if parent then o.Parent = parent end
    return o
end

local function corner(inst, r)
    mk("UICorner", { CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, r or 10) }, inst)
end

local function stroke(inst, color, thick, trans)
    return mk("UIStroke", {
        Color = color or Theme.purple,
        Thickness = thick or 1.4,
        Transparency = trans or 0,
        ApplyStrokeMode = Enum.ApplyStrokeMode.Border,
    }, inst)
end

local function gradient(inst, c1, c2, rot)
    return mk("UIGradient", {
        Color = ColorSequence.new(c1, c2),
        Rotation = rot or 0,
    }, inst)
end

local function pad(inst, p)
    mk("UIPadding", {
        PaddingTop = UDim.new(0, p), PaddingBottom = UDim.new(0, p),
        PaddingLeft = UDim.new(0, p), PaddingRight = UDim.new(0, p),
    }, inst)
end

-- botão com hover suave
local function hoverify(btn, normal, hover)
    btn.MouseEnter:Connect(function()
        TweenService:Create(btn, TweenInfo.new(0.16, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad), { BackgroundColor3 = hover }):Play()
    end)
    btn.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
        TweenService:Create(btn, TweenInfo.new(0.16, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad), { BackgroundColor3 = normal }):Play()
    end)
end

-- "pop" ao clicar
local function clickPop(btn)
    btn.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function()
        TweenService:Create(btn, TweenInfo.new(0.07), { Size = btn.Size - UDim2.fromOffset(4,4) }):Play()
    end)
    btn.MouseButton1Up:Connect(function()
        TweenService:Create(btn, TweenInfo.new(0.12, Enum.EasingStyle.Back), { Size = btn.Size + UDim2.fromOffset(4,4) }):Play()
    end)
end

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
--  LIMPA INSTÂNCIA ANTERIOR + PARENT SEGURO
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
local function getGuiParent()
    local ok, hui = pcall(function() return gethui and gethui() end)
    if ok and hui then return hui end
    local ok2, cg = pcall(function() return game:GetService("CoreGui") end)
    if ok2 and cg then return cg end
    return LocalPlayer:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")
end

local guiParent = getGuiParent()
pcall(function()
    for _, g in ipairs(guiParent:GetChildren()) do
        if g.Name == "TalentlessAnimeHub" then g:Destroy() end
    end
end)

-- a imagem de anime (bg transparente: se não carregar, mostra o placeholder atrás)
UI.artImage = mk("ImageLabel", {
    Image = "", ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Crop,
    BackgroundTransparency = 1, BorderSizePixel = 0,
    Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0), ZIndex = 2,
}, ArtCard)
corner(UI.artImage, 12)

-- carregador robusto: resolve decal->textura (executores que permitem) e,
-- se nada carregar, mantém o placeholder visível em vez de caixa vazia.
UI.setArt = function(id)
    if not (UI.artImage and id and id ~= "") then return end
    UI.artImage.Image = id
    pcall(function()
        local objs = game:GetObjects(id)        -- alguns executores suportam
        local o = objs and objs[1]
        if o then
            local tex = (o:IsA("Decal") and o.Texture)
                or (o:IsA("ImageLabel") and o.Image) or nil
            if tex and tex ~= "" then UI.artImage.Image = tex end
        end
    end)
    task.spawn(function()
        pcall(function() game:GetService("ContentProvider"):PreloadAsync({ UI.artImage }) end)
        task.wait(0.2)
        local loaded = false
        pcall(function() loaded = UI.artImage.IsLoaded end)
        if UI.artFallback then UI.artFallback.Visible = not loaded end
    end)
end

-- carrega a arte: tenta LINK (download), depois arquivo local, depois ID
do
    local function tryLocal(name)
        if not name or name == "" then return nil end
        local ok, a = pcall(function()
            if getcustomasset then return getcustomasset(name) end
            if getsynasset   then return getsynasset(name)   end
            return nil
        end)
        if ok then return a end
        return nil
    end

    local function tryDownload(url)
        if not (url and url ~= "" and writefile) then return nil end
        local data
        -- request() é mais confiável p/ imagem (binário); senão HttpGet
        pcall(function()
            local req = request or http_request or (syn and syn.request) or (http and http.request)
            if req then
                local r = req({ Url = url, Method = "GET" })
                data = r and (r.Body or r.body)
            end
        end)
        if not data then pcall(function() data = game:HttpGetAsync(url) end) end
        if not data then pcall(function() data = game:HttpGet(url) end) end
        if data and data ~= "" then
            local fname = "talentless_art.png"
            local okw = pcall(function() writefile(fname, data) end)
            if okw then return tryLocal(fname) end
        end
        return nil
    end

    local startId = nil
    if ART.url and ART.url ~= "" then startId = tryDownload(ART.url) end
    if not startId and ART.localFile and ART.localFile ~= "" then startId = tryLocal(ART.localFile) end
    startId = startId or ART.asset
    UI.setArt(startId)
end

    }),
}, scrim)

local function makeSpeedBtn(label, mode)
    local b = mk("TextButton", {
        Text = label, Size = UDim2.new(0.333, -3, 1, 0), BackgroundColor3 = Theme.panel2,
        AutoButtonColor = false, Font = Theme.FONT, TextSize = 11, TextColor3 = Theme.sub, BorderSizePixel = 0,
    }, SpeedRow)
    corner(b, 8); stroke(b, Theme.panelHi, 1, 0.4)
    b.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        State.mode = mode
        for m, bb in pairs(UI.speedBtns) do
            local on = (m == mode)
            bb.BackgroundColor3 = on and Theme.purple or Theme.panel2
            bb.TextColor3 = on and Theme.text or Theme.sub
        end
    end)
    UI.speedBtns[mode] = b
    return b
end
makeSpeedBtn("Normal", "Normal")
makeSpeedBtn("Night+", "Nightcore")
makeSpeedBtn("Slow", "Slowed")

-- toggles loop / shuffle / autonext
local TglRow = mk("Frame", { BackgroundTransparency = 1, Size = UDim2.new(1,0,0,30), LayoutOrder = 8 }, Right)
mk("UIListLayout", { FillDirection = Enum.FillDirection.Horizontal, Padding = UDim.new(0,4),
    SortOrder = Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder }, TglRow)
local function makeToggle(label, getf, setf)
    local b = mk("TextButton", {
        Text = label, Size = UDim2.new(0.333, -3, 1, 0), BackgroundColor3 = Theme.panel2,
        AutoButtonColor = false, Font = Theme.FONT, TextSize = 11, TextColor3 = Theme.sub, BorderSizePixel = 0,
    }, TglRow)
    corner(b, 8); stroke(b, Theme.panelHi, 1, 0.4)
    local function refresh()
        local on = getf()
        b.BackgroundColor3 = on and Theme.cyan or Theme.panel2
        b.TextColor3 = on and Color3.fromRGB(20,28,40) or Theme.sub
    end
    b.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() setf(not getf()); refresh() end)
    refresh()
    return b
end
makeToggle("🔁 Loop",
    function() return State.loopEnabled end,
    function(v) State.loopEnabled = v; if v then State.autoNext = true end end)
makeToggle("🔀 Auto",
    function() return State.shuffleEnabled end,
    function(v) State.shuffleEnabled = v; if v then State.autoNext = true end end)
makeToggle("⚙ Cfg",
    function() return UI.settingsOpen end,
    function(v) UI.settingsOpen = v; if UI.toggleSettings then UI.toggleSettings(v) end end)

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
--  NOTIFICAÇÃO (toast)
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
local function notify(text, color)
    local t = mk("TextLabel", {
        Text = text, Font = Theme.FONT, TextSize = 14, TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(20,16,30),
        BackgroundColor3 = color or Theme.cyan, Size = UDim2.fromOffset(10, 34),
        AutomaticSize = Enum.AutomaticSize.X, Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 0, -50),
        AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0), BorderSizePixel = 0, ZIndex = 50,
    }, ScreenGui)
    corner(t, 10); pad(t, 10); stroke(t, Color3.fromRGB(255,255,255), 1, 0.6)
    TweenService:Create(t, TweenInfo.new(0.3, Enum.EasingStyle.Back), { Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 0, 16) }):Play()
    task.delay(2.2, function()
        pcall(function()
            TweenService:Create(t, TweenInfo.new(0.3), { Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 0, -50), TextTransparency = 1, BackgroundTransparency = 1 }):Play()
        end)
        task.delay(0.35, function() pcall(function() t:Destroy() end) end)
    end)
end

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
--  HELPERS DE ESTADO
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
local function curSong() return Songs[State.currentSong] end
local function isFav(idx) return State.favorites[tostring(idx)] == true end
local function toggleFav(idx)
    local k = tostring(idx)
    if State.favorites[k] then State.favorites[k] = nil else State.favorites[k] = true end
    saveData()
end

local function refreshNowPlaying()
    local s = curSong(); if not s then return end
    UI.songName.Text = (s.emoji or "♪") .. " " .. s.name
    UI.bpmLabel.Text = "BPM " .. tostring(s.bpm or "—") .. "   •   #" .. State.currentSong .. "/" .. #Songs
    local fav = isFav(State.currentSong)
    UI.favBtn.Text = fav and "★ Fav" or "☆ Fav"
    UI.favBtn.TextColor3 = fav and Theme.gold or Theme.sub
end

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
--  LISTA DE MÚSICAS (filtrada + busca, com limite p/ fluidez)
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
local MAX_LIST = 70

local function buildFilteredIndices()
    local out = {}
    local q = string.lower(SearchBox.Text or "")
    local function passSearch(s) return q == "" or string.find(string.lower(s.name), q, 1, true) end

    if activeCategory == "★ Favoritos" then
        for i = 1, #Songs do
            local s = Songs[i]
            if s and isFav(i) and not s.broken and passSearch(s) then out[#out+1] = i end
        end
    elseif activeCategory == "⭐ Custom" then
        for i = 1, #Songs do
            local s = Songs[i]
            if s and s.custom and passSearch(s) then out[#out+1] = i end
        end
    else
        for _, i in ipairs(PlayableIdx) do
            local s = Songs[i]
            if s and (activeCategory == nil or s.category == activeCategory) and passSearch(s) then
                out[#out+1] = i
            end
        end
    end
    return out
end

local function refreshList()
    for _, c in ipairs(SongScroll:GetChildren()) do
        if c:IsA("TextButton") then c:Destroy() end
    end
    local idxs = buildFilteredIndices()
    local total = #idxs
    UI.listInfo.Text = (tr("songs")):format(total) ..
        (total > MAX_LIST and (tr("showing")):format(MAX_LIST) or "")
    for n = 1, math.min(total, MAX_LIST) do
        local i = idxs[n]
        local s = Songs[i]
        local row = mk("TextButton", {
            Text = "", Size = UDim2.new(1, -4, 0, 32), BackgroundColor3 = Theme.panel2,
            AutoButtonColor = false, BorderSizePixel = 0, LayoutOrder = n,
        }, SongScroll)
        corner(row, 8); stroke(row, Theme.panelHi, 1, 0.55)
        hoverify(row, Theme.panel2, Theme.panelHi)
        mk("TextLabel", {
            Text = (s.emoji or "♪") .. "  " .. s.name, Font = Theme.FONTR, TextSize = 13,
            BackgroundTransparency = 1, Size = UDim2.new(1, -56, 1, 0), Position = UDim2.fromOffset(10, 0),
            TextColor3 = (i == State.currentSong) and Theme.pink or Theme.text,
            TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left, TextTruncate = Enum.TextTruncate.AtEnd,
        }, row)
        mk("TextLabel", {
            Text = isFav(i) and "★" or "", Font = Theme.FONT, TextSize = 13, BackgroundTransparency = 1,
            Size = UDim2.fromOffset(20, 32), Position = UDim2.new(1, -26, 0, 0), TextColor3 = Theme.gold,
        }, row)
        row.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
            playIndex(i, false)
            refreshNowPlaying(); refreshList()
            notify("▶ " .. s.name, Theme.pink)
        end)
    end
end

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
--  BOTÕES DE CATEGORIA
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
local function setCategory(cat)
    activeCategory = cat
    for _, c in ipairs(CatScroll:GetChildren()) do
        if c:IsA("TextButton") then
            local on = (c:GetAttribute("cat") == (cat or "__all__"))
            c.BackgroundColor3 = on and Theme.purple or Theme.panel2
            c.TextColor3 = on and Theme.text or Theme.sub
        end
    end
    refreshList()
end

local function addCatBtn(label, catValue, count, order)
    local b = mk("TextButton", {
        Text = count and (label .. "  (" .. count .. ")") or label,
        Size = UDim2.new(1, -6, 0, 28), BackgroundColor3 = Theme.panel2,
        AutoButtonColor = false, Font = Theme.FONT, TextSize = 12, TextColor3 = Theme.sub,
        BorderSizePixel = 0, TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left, LayoutOrder = order,
    }, CatScroll)
    corner(b, 8); stroke(b, Theme.panelHi, 1, 0.5); pad(b, 4)
    b:SetAttribute("cat", catValue or "__all__")
    b.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() setCategory(catValue) end)
    return b
end

local function buildCategories()
    for _, c in ipairs(CatScroll:GetChildren()) do
        if c:IsA("TextButton") then c:Destroy() end
    end
    local order = 1
    addCatBtn(tr("all"), nil, #PlayableIdx, order); order = order + 1
    addCatBtn(tr("favs"), "★ Favoritos", nil, order); order = order + 1
    -- conta custom
    local cc = 0; for i=1,#Songs do if Songs[i] and Songs[i].custom then cc = cc + 1 end end
    addCatBtn(tr("custom"), "⭐ Custom", cc, order); order = order + 1
    -- ordena categorias por contagem desc
    local sorted = {}

}

    for cat, n in pairs(CategoryCount) do sorted[#sorted+1] = { cat = cat, n = n } end
    table.sort(sorted, function(a, b) return a.n > b.n end)
    for _, e in ipairs(sorted) do
        if e.cat ~= "Custom" then addCatBtn(e.cat, e.cat, e.n, order); order = order + 1 end
    end
end

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
--  TRADUTOR DA INTERFACE (pt / en / es)
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- percorre a UI e troca os textos fixos pelo idioma atual
local function walkTranslate()
    local map = trMap()
    local i = langIdx()
    for _, o in ipairs(ScreenGui:GetDescendants()) do
        if o:IsA("TextButton") or o:IsA("TextLabel") then
            local base = o:GetAttribute("trbase")
            if not base and map[o.Text] then base = o.Text; o:SetAttribute("trbase", base) end
            if base and map[base] then o.Text = map[base][i] end
        elseif o:IsA("TextBox") then
            local base = o:GetAttribute("trbasePH")
            if not base and map[o.PlaceholderText] then base = o.PlaceholderText; o:SetAttribute("trbasePH", base) end
            if base and map[base] then o.PlaceholderText = map[base][i] end
        end
    end
end

local function applyLang()
    walkTranslate()
    buildCategories()
    setCategory(activeCategory)
    refreshList()
    refreshNowPlaying()
end

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
--  POPUP GENÉRICO (modal)
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
local function makeModal(titleText, w, h)
    local f = mk("Frame", {
        Size = UDim2.fromOffset(w, h), Position = UDim2.new(0.5, -w/2, 0.5, -h/2),
        BackgroundColor3 = Theme.bg2, BorderSizePixel = 0, Visible = false, ZIndex = 30,
    }, Root)
    corner(f, 14); local st = stroke(f, Theme.purple, 1.6, 0.05); gradient(st, Theme.pink, Theme.cyan, 45)
    gradient(f, Theme.bg2, Theme.panel, 120)
    mk("TextLabel", {
        Text = titleText, Font = Theme.FONTB, TextSize = 16, BackgroundTransparency = 1,
        Size = UDim2.new(1, -40, 0, 30), Position = UDim2.fromOffset(14, 8), TextColor3 = Theme.text,
        TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left, ZIndex = 31,
    }, f)
    local x = mk("TextButton", {
        Text = "✕", Size = UDim2.fromOffset(28, 26), Position = UDim2.new(1, -36, 0, 9),
        BackgroundColor3 = Theme.panel, AutoButtonColor = false, Font = Theme.FONTB, TextSize = 14,
        TextColor3 = Theme.red, BorderSizePixel = 0, ZIndex = 31,
    }, f)
    corner(x, 8); clickPop(x)
    x.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() f.Visible = false end)
    return f
end

-- ===== SETTINGS =====
UI.settings = makeModal("⚙  Configurações  •  by Kokuyt450-create", 320, 286)
do
    local y = 46
    local function sToggle(label, getf, setf)
        local row = mk("Frame", { BackgroundTransparency = 1, Size = UDim2.new(1, -28, 0, 30),
            Position = UDim2.fromOffset(14, y), ZIndex = 31 }, UI.settings)
        mk("TextLabel", { Text = label, Font = Theme.FONTR, TextSize = 13, BackgroundTransparency = 1,
            Size = UDim2.new(1, -60, 1, 0), TextColor3 = Theme.text, ZIndex = 31,
            TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left }, row)
        local b = mk("TextButton", { Text = "", Size = UDim2.fromOffset(46, 24),
            Position = UDim2.new(1, -46, 0.5, -12), BackgroundColor3 = Theme.panel, BorderSizePixel = 0,
            AutoButtonColor = false, ZIndex = 31 }, row)
        corner(b, 12)
        local knob = mk("Frame", { Size = UDim2.fromOffset(18,18), Position = UDim2.fromOffset(3,3),
            BackgroundColor3 = Theme.sub, BorderSizePixel = 0, ZIndex = 32 }, b)
        corner(knob, 9)
        local function refresh()
            local on = getf()
            TweenService:Create(b, TweenInfo.new(0.15), { BackgroundColor3 = on and Theme.green or Theme.panel }):Play()
            TweenService:Create(knob, TweenInfo.new(0.15), {
                Position = on and UDim2.fromOffset(25,3) or UDim2.fromOffset(3,3),
                BackgroundColor3 = on and Color3.fromRGB(20,40,28) or Theme.sub }):Play()
        end
        b.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() setf(not getf()); refresh() end)
        refresh()
        y = y + 36
    end
    sToggle("🖱️ Mouse (clicar teclas)",
        function() return Config.MouseClickEnabled end,
        function(v) Config.MouseClickEnabled = v; MouseMap = nil end)
    sToggle("Humanize (toque humano)",
        function() return Config.HumanizeEnabled end,
        function(v) Config.HumanizeEnabled = v end)
    sToggle("Anti-Lag (limite mínimo)",
        function() return Config.AntiLagEnabled end,
        function(v) Config.AntiLagEnabled = v end)
    sToggle("Auto-Next (avançar sozinho)",
        function() return State.autoNext end,
        function(v) State.autoNext = v end)
    -- slider de velocidade
    mk("TextLabel", { Text = "Velocidade global", Font = Theme.FONTR, TextSize = 13,
        BackgroundTransparency = 1, Size = UDim2.new(1,-28,0,18), Position = UDim2.fromOffset(14, y),
        TextColor3 = Theme.text, TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left, ZIndex = 31 }, UI.settings)
    local sb = mk("Frame", { Size = UDim2.new(1, -28, 0, 8), Position = UDim2.fromOffset(14, y+22),
        BackgroundColor3 = Theme.panel, BorderSizePixel = 0, ZIndex = 31 }, UI.settings)
    corner(sb, 4)
    local fill = mk("Frame", { Size = UDim2.new((State.speed-Config.MinSpeed)/(Config.MaxSpeed-Config.MinSpeed),0,1,0),
        BackgroundColor3 = Theme.pink, BorderSizePixel = 0, ZIndex = 32 }, sb)
    corner(fill, 4); gradient(fill, Theme.pink, Theme.cyan, 0)
    UI.speedValLabel = mk("TextLabel", { Text = ("%.2fx"):format(State.speed), Font = Theme.FONT, TextSize = 12,
        BackgroundTransparency = 1, Size = UDim2.fromOffset(50, 18), Position = UDim2.new(1, -64, 0, y),
        TextColor3 = Theme.gold, ZIndex = 31 }, UI.settings)
    local draggingS = false
    local function setFromX(px)
        local rel = math.clamp((px - sb.AbsolutePosition.X) / sb.AbsoluteSize.X, 0, 1)
        State.speed = Config.MinSpeed + rel * (Config.MaxSpeed - Config.MinSpeed)
        fill.Size = UDim2.new(rel, 0, 1, 0)
        UI.speedValLabel.Text = ("%.2fx"):format(State.speed)
    end
    sb.InputBegan:Connect(function(i)
        if i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 or i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
            draggingS = true; setFromX(i.Position.X)
        end
    end)
    UserInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(i)
        if draggingS and (i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement or i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch) then
            setFromX(i.Position.X)
        end
    end)
    UserInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(i)
        if i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 or i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then draggingS = false end
    end)
end
UI.toggleSettings = function(v) UI.settings.Visible = v and true or false end

-- ===== CUSTOM =====
UI.custom = makeModal("⭐  Criar Música Custom", 340, 270)
do
    local function field(ph, y, h)
        local t = mk("TextBox", { PlaceholderText = ph, Text = "", Size = UDim2.new(1, -28, 0, h or 32),
            Position = UDim2.fromOffset(14, y), BackgroundColor3 = Theme.panel, Font = Theme.FONTR,
            TextSize = 13, TextColor3 = Theme.text, PlaceholderColor3 = Theme.sub, BorderSizePixel = 0,
            ClearTextOnFocus = false, TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left,
            TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Top, MultiLine = (h ~= nil), ZIndex = 31 }, UI.custom)
        corner(t, 9); stroke(t, Theme.panelHi, 1, 0.3); pad(t, 8)
        return t
    end
    local nameBox  = field("Nome da música", 46)
    local bpmBox   = field("BPM (ex: 120)  — use 'detect bpm' no midi2lua", 84)
    local notesBox = field("Cole a sequência do midi2lua aqui  (ex: q w e [qe] - -)", 122, 70)
    mk("TextLabel", {
        Text = "🎹 Converta um MIDI em midi2lua e cole a sequência aqui p/ ficar igual à original",
        Font = Theme.FONTR, TextSize = 10, BackgroundTransparency = 1,
        Size = UDim2.new(1, -28, 0, 24), Position = UDim2.fromOffset(14, 196),
        TextColor3 = Theme.sub, TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left,
        TextWrapped = true, ZIndex = 31,
    }, UI.custom)
    local saveBtn = mk("TextButton", { Text = "✓ SALVAR & TOCAR", Size = UDim2.new(1, -28, 0, 38),
        Position = UDim2.fromOffset(14, 224), BackgroundColor3 = Theme.pink, AutoButtonColor = false,
        Font = Theme.FONTB, TextSize = 14, TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(28,18,34), BorderSizePixel = 0, ZIndex = 31 }, UI.custom)
    corner(saveBtn, 10); gradient(saveBtn, Theme.pink, Theme.purple, 35); clickPop(saveBtn)
    saveBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        local nm = nameBox.Text
        local sq = notesBox.Text
        if nm == "" or sq == "" then notify("Preencha nome e notas!", Theme.red); return end
        local bpm = tonumber(bpmBox.Text) or 120
        local entry = { name = nm, bpm = bpm, sequence = sq }
        table.insert(State.customSongs, entry)
        table.insert(Songs, { name = nm, bpm = bpm, emoji = "⭐", category = "Custom", sequence = sq, custom = true })
        TOTAL_SONGS = #Songs
        saveData(); rebuildIndexes(); buildCategories(); refreshList()
        UI.custom.Visible = false
        playIndex(#Songs, false); refreshNowPlaying()
        notify("⭐ Custom criada: " .. nm, Theme.green)
    end)
end

-- ===== CREDITS / HELP =====
UI.credits = makeModal("★  Créditos", 320, 210)
do
    local y = 50
    for _, c in ipairs(CREDITS) do
        mk("TextLabel", { Text = c.emoji .. "  " .. c.name, Font = Theme.FONTB, TextSize = 14,
            BackgroundTransparency = 1, Size = UDim2.new(1,-28,0,20), Position = UDim2.fromOffset(16, y),
            TextColor3 = Theme.pink, TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left, ZIndex = 31 }, UI.credits)
        mk("TextLabel", { Text = c.role, Font = Theme.FONTR, TextSize = 11, BackgroundTransparency = 1,
            Size = UDim2.new(1,-28,0,16), Position = UDim2.fromOffset(16, y+18), TextColor3 = Theme.sub,
            TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left, ZIndex = 31 }, UI.credits)
        y = y + 42
    end
    mk("TextLabel", { Text = BRAND.title .. " v" .. BRAND.version .. " \"" .. BRAND.codename .. "\"  •  " .. #Songs .. " músicas",
        Font = Theme.FONTR, TextSize = 11, BackgroundTransparency = 1, Size = UDim2.new(1,-28,0,16),
        Position = UDim2.fromOffset(16, y+2), TextColor3 = Theme.cyan, TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left,
        ZIndex = 31 }, UI.credits)
end

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
--  HANDLERS DE BOTÕES PRINCIPAIS
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
PlayBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    playIndex(State.currentSong, State.autoNext); refreshNowPlaying()
    notify("▶ " .. (curSong() and curSong().name or ""), Theme.pink)
end)

ShuffleBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    State.shuffleEnabled = true; State.autoNext = true
    State.currentSong = PlayableIdx[math.random(1, #PlayableIdx)]
    playIndex(State.currentSong, true); refreshNowPlaying(); refreshList()
    notify("🔀 Shuffle ativado", Theme.purple)
end)

RandomBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    State.currentSong = PlayableIdx[math.random(1, #PlayableIdx)]
    playIndex(State.currentSong, false); refreshNowPlaying(); refreshList()
    notify("🎲 " .. (curSong() and curSong().name or ""), Theme.cyan)
end)

UI.playPauseBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() pauseResume(); refreshNowPlaying() end)
StopBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() stopPlayback(); refreshNowPlaying() end)
NextBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() nextSong(); startPlayback(); refreshNowPlaying(); refreshList() end)
PrevBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() prevSong(); startPlayback(); refreshNowPlaying(); refreshList() end)

QueueBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    table.insert(State.queue, State.currentSong)
    notify("≣ Adicionado à fila (" .. #State.queue .. ")", Theme.cyan)
end)

UI.favBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    toggleFav(State.currentSong); refreshNowPlaying(); refreshList(); buildCategories()
    setCategory(activeCategory)
end)

SearchBox:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Text"):Connect(refreshList)

UI.helpBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() UI.credits.Visible = not UI.credits.Visible end)
UI.langBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    if UI.langModal then UI.langModal.Visible = true end
end)

-- clicar na arte anime cicla pelas imagens da lista ART.options
do
    local ai = 1
    if UI.artImage then
        local hit = mk("TextButton", {
            Text = "", BackgroundTransparency = 1, AutoButtonColor = false,
            Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0), ZIndex = 5,
        }, UI.artImage)
        hit.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
            ai = ai % #ART.options + 1
            UI.setArt(ART.options[ai])
            notify("🎴 Arte " .. ai .. "/" .. #ART.options, Theme.purple)
        end)
    end
end

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
--  MINIMIZAR / FECHAR / RESTAURAR
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
UI.restoreBtn = mk("TextButton", {
    Text = "🌸", Size = UDim2.fromOffset(52, 52), Position = UDim2.new(0, 18, 0.5, -26),
    BackgroundColor3 = Theme.panel, AutoButtonColor = false, Font = Theme.FONTB, TextSize = 24,
    TextColor3 = Theme.pink, BorderSizePixel = 0, Visible = false, ZIndex = 40,
}, ScreenGui)
corner(UI.restoreBtn, 26); local rbStroke = stroke(UI.restoreBtn, Theme.pink, 2, 0.1)
gradient(rbStroke, Theme.pink, Theme.cyan, 45); clickPop(UI.restoreBtn)
UI.restoreBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    UI.restoreBtn.Visible = false
    Root.Visible = true
    Root.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(0,0)
    TweenService:Create(Root, TweenInfo.new(0.28, Enum.EasingStyle.Back), { Size = UDim2.fromOffset(700, 500) }):Play()
end)
MinBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    TweenService:Create(Root, TweenInfo.new(0.2, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad), { Size = UDim2.fromOffset(0,0) }):Play()
    task.delay(0.2, function() Root.Visible = false; UI.restoreBtn.Visible = true end)
end)
CloseBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    TweenService:Create(Root, TweenInfo.new(0.2), { Size = UDim2.fromOffset(0,0) }):Play()
    task.delay(0.22, function() stopPlayback(); ScreenGui:Destroy() end)
end)

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
--  ARRASTAR JANELA
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
do
    local dragging, dragStart, startPos
    TopBar.InputBegan:Connect(function(i)
        if i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 or i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
            dragging = true; dragStart = i.Position; startPos = Root.Position
            i.Changed:Connect(function()
                if i.UserInputState == Enum.UserInputState.End then dragging = false end
            end)
        end
    end)
    UserInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(i)
        if dragging and (i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement or i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch) then
            local d = i.Position - dragStart
            Root.Position = UDim2.new(startPos.X.Scale, startPos.X.Offset + d.X, startPos.Y.Scale, startPos.Y.Offset + d.Y)
        end
    end)
end

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
--  LOOP DE PROGRESSO + ÍCONE PLAY/PAUSE
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
    local target = State.isPlaying and State.progress or 0
    local cur = UI.progFill.Size.X.Scale
    UI.progFill.Size = UDim2.new(cur + (target - cur) * 0.25, 0, 1, 0)
    if State.isPlaying then
        UI.playPauseBtn.Text = State.isPaused and "▶" or "⏸"
        local s = curSong()
        UI.nowText.Text = (tr("note")):format(
            s and s.name or "", math.floor(State.progress * 100), State.currentNote, State.totalNotes)
    else
        UI.playPauseBtn.Text = "⏯"
        if UI.progFill.Size.X.Scale < 0.01 then UI.nowText.Text = tr("ready") end
    end
end)

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
--  ATALHO DE TECLADO (RightAlt = mostrar/esconder)
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(i, gpe)
    if gpe then return end
    if i.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.RightAlt then
        Root.Visible = not Root.Visible
        UI.restoreBtn.Visible = false
    end
end)

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
--  INICIALIZA UI
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
buildCategories()
setCategory(nil)
refreshNowPlaying()
-- ativa botão de velocidade Normal
if UI.speedBtns and UI.speedBtns["Normal"] then
    UI.speedBtns["Normal"].BackgroundColor3 = Theme.purple
    UI.speedBtns["Normal"].TextColor3 = Theme.text
end

-- animação de entrada
Root.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(0, 0)
TweenService:Create(Root, TweenInfo.new(0.4, Enum.EasingStyle.Back, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
    { Size = UDim2.fromOffset(700, 500) }):Play()

-- ════════ SELETOR DE IDIOMA (abre ao executar) ════════
UI.langModal = makeModal("🌐  Idioma · Language · Idioma", 320, 250)
do
    mk("TextLabel", {
        Text = "Escolha o idioma do hub:\nChoose the hub language:\nElige el idioma:",
        Font = Theme.FONTR, TextSize = 12, BackgroundTransparency = 1,
        Size = UDim2.new(1, -28, 0, 52), Position = UDim2.fromOffset(14, 40),
        TextColor3 = Theme.sub, TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left,
        TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Top, ZIndex = 31,
    }, UI.langModal)
    local function langBtn(flag, label, code, y)
        local b = mk("TextButton", {
            Text = "   " .. flag .. "   " .. label, Size = UDim2.new(1, -28, 0, 42),
            Position = UDim2.fromOffset(14, y), BackgroundColor3 = Theme.panel2,
            AutoButtonColor = false, Font = Theme.FONT, TextSize = 15, TextColor3 = Theme.text,
            BorderSizePixel = 0, TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left, ZIndex = 31,
        }, UI.langModal)
        corner(b, 10); local st = stroke(b, Theme.pink, 1.2, 0.2); gradient(st, Theme.pink, Theme.purple, 30)
        hoverify(b, Theme.panel2, Theme.panelHi); clickPop(b)
        b.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
            State.lang = code
            saveData()
            applyLang()
            UI.langModal.Visible = false
            notify("🌐 " .. label, Theme.purple)
        end)
        return b
    end
    langBtn("🇧🇷", "Português (BR)", "pt", 96)
    langBtn("🇺🇸", "English",        "en", 144)
    langBtn("🇪🇸", "Español",        "es", 192)
end

-- aplica o idioma salvo (se não for o padrão) e abre o seletor ao executar
applyLang()
UI.langModal.Visible = true

notify((tr("loaded")):format(#PlayableIdx), Theme.pink)
